chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-591 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders on M.A. 9559/2022 17.08.2022 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Korai advocate for surety. Mr. Niaz Hussain Meerani, Special Prosecutor NAB. ----- Through this application, the applicant/surety seeks return of surety papers furnished by him in this case. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB after going through the record has endorsed no objection for return of surety documents by stating that since main petition has been dismissed vide order dated 23.06.2021, the surety papers are no more required by this Court. Accordingly, this application is allowed and the office is directed to return the surety documents to the surety after proper verification and identification as per rules. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
